headline: Labcorp to Present at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference
summary: Labcorp (NYSE: LH), a global leader of innovative and comprehensive laboratory services, announced today that the company will present at the 2026 Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference in New York on Wednesday, June 3, from 12:15 pm to 12:45 pm ET.
